name: Post-remediation live crawl, browser smoke, and drift rerun
decision: R-8 is complete as a post-remediation verification rerun. The browser-rendered public pages still hydrate with route-specific SEO/content/schema markers, and local source gates pass after rebuild. Production is not release-ready because the live HTTP/static/redirect/private-boundary layer still reflects the old SPA fallback behavior from E-3/E-4/R-3/R-4/R-6.

releaseDecision.reason: Production deployment parity blockers remain unchanged at the HTTP/static/redirect/private-boundary layer.

confirmedRenderedPositives: Homepage renders Finnish title, lang, H1, canonical, robots index/follow, crawlable anchors, and LocalBusiness/WebSite/WebPage/Breadcrumb JSON-LD.
Finnish service detail renders route-specific title, H1, canonical, robots index/follow, service content, and Service/Breadcrumb JSON-LD.
Product slug page renders title, H1, canonical slug URL, robots index/follow, price, stock, and Product/Breadcrumb JSON-LD.
Checkout renders on /checkout with no canonical and robots noindex,nofollow.
English mobile service page renders lang en, English title, H1, canonical, and Service/Breadcrumb JSON-LD.
English contact page renders NAP/contact markers, canonical, robots index/follow, ContactPage/Breadcrumb JSON-LD.
Invalid route renders a noindex 404 UI in-browser.

remainingBlockers.finding: Production static SEO assets and Merchant feed are still not deployed or routed correctly.
remainingBlockers.evidence: robots.txt and sitemap.xml return 404; sitemap-products.xml and merchant-products.xml return text/html.

remainingBlockers.finding: Private/admin routes still return public HTTP 200 at the edge.
remainingBlockers.verification: Unauthenticated private/admin routes return 401, 403, or safe 404 and render no private content.

remainingBlockers.finding: Legacy redirects and product identifier redirects remain inactive on production.
remainingBlockers.evidence: Legacy route and product UUID samples return 200 with zero redirects.
remainingBlockers.verification: Live curl matrix returns one-hop 301/308 redirects to canonical destinations.

remainingBlockers.finding: Invalid and noncanonical routes remain HTTP soft-404s.
remainingBlockers.verification: Invalid routes return 404 or 410 at HTTP level.

remainingBlockers.finding: Raw HTML remains a generic JavaScript shell.
remainingBlockers.evidence: Sampled raw HTML has generic title, empty canonical, no JSON-LD, zero anchors, and H1 'This site requires JavaScript'.
remainingBlockers.verification: Evaluate SSR/prerender/static route snapshots or maintain rendered validation as a known SPA limitation.

commands.liveHttpMatrix: while IFS= read -r url; do curl -sSIL -o /dev/null --max-time 20 -w '%{url_effective}|http=%{http_code}|content_type=%{content_type}|redirects=%{num_redirects}|time=%{time_total}\n' "$url"; done < <(node -e "const b=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.seo-work/crawl/e4-drift-baseline-2026-06-22.json','utf8')); for (const r of b.representativeUrls) console.log(r.url)")
commands.build: /Users/chandler/.codex/skills/distill-heavy-output/scripts/distill_cmd.sh "Run the Mitra Auto Vite production build for R-8 verification. Return exactly: status passed/failed, output directory, key warnings grouped by source, fatal errors, and whether public static assets were copied. Do not include routine transform progress." -- npm run build
commands.rawHtmlSnapshot: node raw HTML metadata snapshot for homepage, service detail, product slug, and invalid route
commands.browserSmoke: mcp__playwright browser smoke for homepage, service detail, product slug, checkout, English mobile service, English contact, invalid route

next: Resolve production deployment/provider parity blockers from R-3, R-4, R-5, and R-6 before another growth-readiness rerun.
